infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dokra uses your location to track your workout route and calculate real distance.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Dokra uses your location in the background to keep tracking your workout even when your screen is off.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Dokra uses your location in the background to keep tracking your workout even when your screen is off.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Dokra uses your motion sensors to count your steps and detect your activity type accurately.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Dokra uses your location to track your workout route and calculate real distance.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Dokra uses your location in the background to keep tracking your workout even when the screen is off.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Dokra uses your location to track your workout route and calculate real distance.

plugins.photosPermission: Dokra needs access to your photos to set a workout card background.
plugins.cameraPermission: Dokra needs camera access to capture workout moments.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Dokra to save your workout share cards to your gallery.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Dokra to save photos to your gallery.
